description: §14.8.9 channel egress (§38) — the channel broadcast() built-in is a compiler-emitted client-egress serializer; a protected row reaching broadcast(row) is stripped at the publish sink and fires I-PROTECT-STRIP-001. The compile-time half of the channel egress floor (item 6 codes). RUNTIME NOTE: the published WS frame contents are not asserted — the harness has no WebSocket driver (adapter-gated, see ss60.progress).
rationale: §14.8.9 Composition: channel broadcast() publishes a JSON frame to every subscriber; it SHALL apply the same redact-at-sink as the server-fn return. A protected row reaching broadcast(row) strips passwordHash at the publish sink; the strip is announced by I-PROTECT-STRIP-001.
